code:
%%{FinTech_LedgerService}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (FinTech_AuthVault)

[FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (FinTech_FraudDetection)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (FinTech_FraudDetection)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为AuthVault设计一个Hub Sync状态机，核心场景是本地hub与federation出现分歧时的同步流程。起点应该是TransactionQueue检测到out of sync的状态。
明白，那OUT_OF_SYNC的触发条件具体有哪些？我目前想到stale CRDT frame和network topology change，还需要包含metrics相关的情况吗？
对，加上missing contributions or metrics。触发后会向PaymentGateway发起SyncRequested，然后进入FETCH_REMOTE状态，从FraudDetection等federation peers拉取最新的vector clocks和state diffs。
好的，主链路我梳理一下：FETCH_REMOTE完成后进入MERGE执行CRDT merge，然后VALIDATE做schema和签名校验，最后达到SYNCED状态回到TransactionQueue。我先画出这条happy path。
等等，异常路径不能漏。FETCH_REMOTE可能遇到NetworkTimeout或AuthError，MERGE可能有ConflictUnresolved，VALIDATE可能出现HashMismatch或SignatureInvalid，这些都要汇聚到FAILED状态。
收到，FAILED之后需要重试机制对吧？我加一个RETRY状态，通过RetryScheduled回到OUT_OF_SYNC重新同步。另外SYNCED本身也可能因为PeriodicSync或参数变更再次进入OUT_OF_SYNC。
还有一个运维场景：如果HubOffline或者LatencyHigh，直接从OUT_OF_SYNC进入DEGRADED降级状态，然后escalate到PaymentGateway的ops团队处理。这个分支和主流程是独立的。
完成了。我把OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY、DEGRADED这八个核心状态用橙色高亮标记，和外围的TransactionQueue、PaymentGateway、FraudDetection区分开。整个状态机现在覆盖了正常同步、异常重试和运维降级三条主线。
